creator: language.devel@gmail.com
text:
It's already set in the Makefile to
JAVA_VERSION=	11 17

That has always worked in the past to prevent building with the wrong version of Java installed...
Could this be related to the recent change in USES from

USES=		cpe python shebangfix
USE_JAVA=	yes
USE_ANT=	yes

to
USES=		cpe java:ant python shebangfix
?
